Neksus JobSpec (neksus-jobspec)

What it is
- Local-first CLI and Python package for structured, branded,
  machine-readable job campaign pages.
- Free/core scope: define -> validate -> lint -> preview/render -> export/feed/sitemap.

Product boundary
- No hosted SaaS/API infrastructure.
- No auth/database/candidate intake/CV processing/payments.
- No direct LinkedIn API posting.

Schema basics (v0.4.x)
- Top-level fields: `schema_version`, `id`, `page`, `job`, `components`, optional `campaign`, optional `rendering`.
- `job.apply` methods: `email`, `external_url`, `ats_url`, `custom`, `agent_ready`.

Key commands
- `neksus-jobspec doctor`
- `neksus-jobspec spec validate <path>`
- `neksus-jobspec spec lint <path>`
- `neksus-jobspec spec preview <path>`
- `neksus-jobspec spec render <path> --format web|json-ld`
- `neksus-jobspec spec export <path> --target generic-json|generic-xml|linkedin-ready-json --out <path>`
- `neksus-jobspec feed export ...`
- `neksus-jobspec feed sitemap ...`
- `neksus-jobspec themes list|show|init|validate`

Optional local MCP
- Install: `pip install "neksus-jobspec[mcp]"`
- Run: `neksus-jobspec-mcp`
- Includes `spec_lint` in addition to validate/render/export/feed tools.

Docs entry points
- `README.md`
- `docs/guides/first-run-checklist.md`
- `docs/guides/quickstart.md`
- `docs/guides/cli-decision-guide.md`
- `docs/guides/scope-and-non-goals.md`
- `docs/concepts/specification.md`
- `docs/exports.md`
- `docs/integrations/mcp-server.md`
